title: Super Create smp
description: This is a mod pack created for the super create server (it features create survival and adventuring)
body:
# **Super Create**
**A Create-Focused Technical & Exploration Modpack**
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8abff574784aea8856dd9bf38a6d841aa9a5db6.png)
Super Create is a lightweight yet feature-rich modpack built around the full potential of the Create ecosystem. It expands the automation, engineering, and building experience of Create while keeping performance high and the gameplay stable.

This pack is designed for players who want to build advanced machines, design efficient factories, explore new structures, and enjoy a smooth technical Minecraft experience without unnecessary content bloat.
## **Key Features**
**Expanded Create Gameplay**

Super Create includes a broad collection of Create addons that introduce new machines, materials, decorations, and automation tools. These addons build on Create’s core philosophy of mechanical engineering and allow you to design more complex systems, including:
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create Copycats+
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create Enchantment Industry
- Create New Age
- Create: Let The Adventure Begin
- Create: Steam 'n Rails
- Create Structures
- Create: Man of Many Planes
- Create Jetpack
- Create More: Parallel Pipes
- Create: Bells & Whistles

Together, these mods greatly expand Create’s automation capabilities, transportation options, world generation and aesthetic building possibilities.

**Performance and Stability**

Super Create includes several optimization mods to ensure smooth performance, even on larger worlds or more complex builds. These include Embeddium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Oculus, Dynamic FPS, Entity Culling, Distant Horizons (LODs), and more.

These improvements make the modpack ideal for long-term worlds, servers, or players with mid-range hardware.

**Quality of Life Features**
To support building, exploration, and technical gameplay, Super Create also includes:
- JEI for recipe viewing
- WorldEdit + WorldEdit CUI
- Chisel Reborn and Factory Blocks for creative building
- Immersive Aircraft for additional travel options
- Essential Mod for simple multiplayer connection
- Several fixes for memory leaks, loading times, UI responsiveness, and model rendering

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0efbf39ade6c63883b06fe62b9f692190ef3bedc.png)
### **What Makes This Pack Unique**
Super Create focuses on expanding Create while avoiding unnecessary clutter. The result is a pack that feels familiar and lightweight but still offers meaningful progression, creative engineering possibilities, and a more engaging world to explore.

If you want a modpack centered on mechanical creativity, automation, exploration, and solid performance, Super Create provides everything you need without overwhelming you.
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6383731a8cd6eaca0c2a117032e84eaeb858e3c9.png)

# **Mods:**
- Create
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Create Deco
- Create Jetpack
- Create Man of Many Planes
- Create More: Parallel Pipes
- Create Slice & Dice
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create: Copycats+
- Create: Enchantment Industry
- Create: Let The Adventure Begin
- Create: New Age
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: Structures
- Architectury API
- Botarium
- Chisel Reborn
- Continuity
- Cryonic Config
- Distant Horizons
- Dynamic FPS
- Embeddium
- Entity Culling
- Essential Mod
- Factory Blocks
- Fast IP Ping
- FerriteCore
- Forgifie Fabric API
- Geckolib

- Immersive Aircraft

- Kotlin for Forge

- Oculus
- Remove Reloading Screen
- Sinytra Connector
- WorldEdit CUI
- WorldEdit
- ZeroCore
